text: What do you believe about business that almost everyone disagrees with?
You learn more about yourself through building something authentically than you learn through anything else.
And in that same sense, the more you align yourself deeply with your morals and ethics,
you'll interestingly find that opportunities start to find you.
The universe starts bringing the right people into your orbit.
And as a result, you start to make more money.
So I'd say, the more aligned you are with your values and ethics, the more money you make in business.
